title: verbascum thapsus subsp. neglectum
intro: Verbascum thapsus subsp. neglectum, also known as the Himalayan mullein, is a plant species belonging to the mullein family and is a subspecies of Verbascum thapsus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum thapsus subsp. neglectum include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves for topical application, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
